subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the most sacred and exalted Court of the Sovereign of existence, Who through the effulgences of the Orb of proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مالک وجود را لایق و سزا که از تجلیات انوار نیر برهان
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @firmness in the Covenant, @exhortations and counsels
